subpc_discriminator.note: DEV(Newton) vs MOND(1.36) at sub-pc; data ALREADY exist (Chae)

structural_obstacle.verdict: bound binaries disrupted beyond r_J~1.7 pc (Jiang & Tremaine 2010); the 5-50 pc transition regime is 3-30x wider than r_J -> NOT accessible to bound binaries; needs comoving/dissolving pairs

surveys.Gaia_DR4_2026: deeper bound-binary census but still <~1-2 pc (tidal cap)
surveys.comoving_pairs_DR3_DR4: 6D phase-space pairs to 10-100 pc exist but mix bound + dissolving -> 3D velocity not orbital
surveys.4MOST_WEAVE: high-res RV to sharpen plane-of-sky velocities sub-pc
